stemHtml: Which selection best describes a Point of Equal Time PET, or Critical Point, between the departure aerodrome and the destination where one destination alternate has been nominated? The PET is a track position from which it takes the same time to fly…

options.a: onward to the destination as it would to return to the departure point.
options.b: to the departure point in actual or flight planned conditions.
options.c: back to the departure point as the planned flight time taken to fly to it.
options.d: to the destination as the flight planned time to the destination alternate.
